purpose: Represent digital verification, evidence relationships, physical observation, and external witness as separate dimensions while retaining legacy V0-V5 only as a current Builder compatibility field.

digital_profile.rule: Choose the weakest profile supported by operations actually performed.

relationships_checked.rule: State the exact relationship checked; do not use the unqualified word verified.

physical_observation.rule: Physical observation never automatically raises the digital profile.

external_witness.rule: State exact scope. Notarization does not automatically become formal independent attestation.

coverage_scope.rule: Coverage scope limits the conclusion even when one component was checked deeply.

limitations_and_claims_not_made.rule: Every new verification record must disclose limitations, unavailable targets, corrections or supersession checked, and claims not made.

legacy_v_compatibility.role: Legacy digital posture and archived-record compatibility only.

mapping.V4: integrity_checked with official-script source review and execution

legacy_v_compatibility.boundary: Historical V6-V8 records remain preserved. New records must use a V0-V5 compatibility value for digital work and a separate physical_observation value.

examples.case: Hash one Arweave payload and compare with the approved manifest
Review Shenzhen notarial certificate and public preservation archive without independently reading sealed discs
Onsite observation plus independent digital hash checks

prohibited_claims: V8 is the highest current verification level.
A notarial certificate proves all project claims or all three Bitcoin Originals.
One deeply checked component proves full-protocol coverage.
A hash match proves semantic truth.
A signature proves civil identity or truth without separate evidence.
